hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "UserPromptSubmit", "additionalContext": "MANDATORY: Before doing ANYTHING else, follow the 14-step checklist in CLAUDE.md in order: 1-Read CLAUDE.md, 2-Ask if ambiguous, 3-Explore only if needed, 4-Implement, 5-Write tests, 6-Bug check, 7-Regression tests, 8-Coverage check, 9-Build & test, 10-Update CLAUDE.md, 11-Update README if needed, 12-Ask for DB backup, 13-Commit & push after backup confirmed, 14-Remind user to restore DB."}}'
